SeasonResult: St. Andrew's opened the recovered Spring 2004 boys soccer archive with region wins over Cathedral Academy and Charleston Collegiate on March 22-23.
StatusNote: Archive build in progress. The season currently includes the March 22 region win over Cathedral Academy and the March 23 region win over Charleston Collegiate.
HistoricalSummary: The Spring 2004 boys soccer archive currently begins with St. Andrew's 4-1 SCISA Region 2-AA win over Cathedral Academy on March 22, 2004, followed by a 13-0 region win over Charleston Collegiate on March 23.
Hamish Huntley scored twice in each of the first two recovered matches. Will Massey had a goal and assist against Cathedral Academy, then added a goal and two assists against Charleston Collegiate.
The Charleston Collegiate scoring line names 12 of St. Andrew's 13 goals and credits Omar Glenn with three assists.
HighlightNotes: St. Andrew's started 2-0 overall and 2-0 in SCISA Region 2-AA play.
Hamish Huntley scored four goals across the first two recovered games.
Omar Glenn had two goals and three assists against Charleston Collegiate.
